LanguageData.Cascadia_Seattle.placeRules.rulesStrings: place_summary->northern ruin of corporate towers and flooded suburbs
LanguageData.Cascadia_Vancouver.placeRules.rulesStrin: place_summary->ruined coastal city reclaimed by ex-Enclave scientists
LanguageData.HHTools_ArroyoTerritory.placeRules.rules: place_summary->ancestral home of the Chosen One
LanguageData.HHTools_BajaTerritory.placeRules.rulesSt: place_summary->southern trade frontier of the NCR
LanguageData.HHTools_BoneyardState.placeRules.rulesSt: place_summary->rebuilt ruins of pre-War Los Angeles
LanguageData.HHTools_Coloradum.placeRules.rulesString: place_summary->Legion stronghold along the Colorado River
LanguageData.HHTools_DayglowState.placeRules.rulesStr: place_summary->coastal region scarred by reactor meltdown
LanguageData.HHTools_Dine.placeRules.rulesStrings.2: place_summary->resurgent Navajo confederation across canyon lands
LanguageData.HHTools_DogCityTwoSun.placeRules.rulesSt: place_summary->brutal Legion territory ruled by beast handlers
LanguageData.HHTools_Flagstaff.placeRules.rulesString: place_summary->Caesar’s seat of command and judgment
LanguageData.HHTools_HiddenValley.placeRules.rulesStr: place_summary->underground bunker complex in the Mojave
LanguageData.HHTools_LostHills.placeRules.rulesString: place_summary->founding bunker of the Brotherhood of Steel
LanguageData.HHTools_MojaveTerritory.placeRules.rules: place_summary->strategic desert frontier around New Vegas
LanguageData.HHTools_NavarroTerritory.placeRules.rule: place_summary->former Enclave base turned NCR outpost
LanguageData.HHTools_NewCanaan.placeRules.rulesString: place_summary->Mormon settlement turned trade and faith hub
LanguageData.HHTools_NewVegas.placeRules.rulesStrings: place_summary->city of lights and politics amid the Mojave
LanguageData.HHTools_Phoenixia.placeRules.rulesString: place_summary->ruins of old Phoenix remade under Legion law
LanguageData.HHTools_ShadySands.placeRules.rulesStrin: place_summary->capital of the New California Republic
LanguageData.HHTools_ShiState.placeRules.rulesStrings: place_summary->scientific enclave from San Francisco survivors
LanguageData.HHTools_TheBigCircle.placeRules.rulesStr: place_summary->major caravan route connecting NCR and New Reno
LanguageData.HHTools_TheDivide.placeRules.rulesString: place_summary->shattered landscape of ruins and storms
LanguageData.HHTools_TheGreatSaltLake.placeRules.rule: place_summary->salt flats and ruins surrounding the ancient lakebed
LanguageData.HHTools_TheHighway80.placeRules.rulesStr: place_summary->old interstate maintained by caravan unions and mercenaries
LanguageData.HHTools_TheJetRoad.placeRules.rulesStrin: place_summary->drug-runner route between New Reno and the Boneyard
LanguageData.HHTools_TheLittleLoop.placeRules.rulesSt: place_summary->regional trade circuit among NCR towns
LanguageData.HHTools_TwinMother.placeRules.rulesStrin: place_summary->tribal holy site repurposed by the Legion
LanguageData.HHTools_Zion.placeRules.rulesStrings.2: place_summary->lush canyon home of surviving tribes
LanguageData.Texico_Chihuahua.placeRules.rulesStrings: place_summary->dust-choked mountains of warring tribes and raider forts
LanguageData.Texico_RioGrande.placeRules.rulesStrings: place_summary->river frontier of trade, raiders, and forgotten outposts
LanguageData.Texico_Sinaloa.placeRules.rulesStrings.2: place_summary->southern wasteland ruled by chem lords and gun-runners
LanguageData.Wasteland_CityRuins.placeRules.rulesStri: place_summary->collapsed metropolis of leaning skyscrapers haunted by drones and digital ghosts
LanguageData.Wasteland_Desert.placeRules.rulesStrings: place_summary->sun-blasted desert of molten glass and buried skyscrapers where scavengers hunt for relics
LanguageData.Wasteland_Forest.placeRules.rulesStrings: place_summary->mutated forest of iron-barked trees and bioluminescent fungus overgrowing military ruins
